message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 14:15 on sunday
If the booking fails how about 13:15
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 10:45 and should depart from kings lynn
The train should be on the same day as the restaurant booking and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
